interaction_phrase: Delivering the industry's first full-stack silicon spin CMOS quantum system to the
occurrence_sentence: This transformation and momentum are reflected most prominently by our recent accomplishments: * Delivering the industry's first full-stack silicon spin CMOS quantum system to the UK's National Quantum Computing Centre (NQCC) – This isn't a lab experiment; it's a [deployed, rack-based system](https://quantummotion.com/quantum-motion-delivers-the-industrys-first-full-stack-silicon-cmos-quantum-computer/) manufactured using 300 mm wafers using CMOS transistors for silicon spin qubits— the same infrastructure that builds the world's classical processors.
target_actor_key: uk s national quantum computing centre

interaction_phrase: New technology partnership for NVIDIA NVQLink™
occurrence_sentence: Delivering a full-stack quantum computer that integrates with HPC systems requires partnering with industry leaders and deploying powerful, open standard-based technologies designed for hybrid computing environments. Quantum Motion was recently [highlighted](https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-nvqlink-quantum-gpu-computing) as one of the newest partners focused on integrating NVIDIA's high-speed interconnect, NVQLink , with our qubit systems.
